arts.ttl: Burnley FC release statement on Hannibal incident with Preston North End's Milutin Osmajic as investigation launched
arts.sum: Burnley FC have confirmed they have reported the incident involving Hannibal and Preston North End’s Milutin Osmajic during today’s feisty derby to the officials.

arts.ttl: Why Burnley boss Scott Parker was 'ecstatic' with his players despite disappointing Preston draw
arts.sum: Scott Parker was “absolutely ecstatic” with his Burnley team despite speaking of his disappointment at their failure to beat Preston North End.

arts.ttl: Omer Riza makes Aaron Ramsey admission after 'sublime' contribution
arts.sum: Omer Riza was impressed by the contribution of the midfielder, who was at the heart of Cardiff's equaliser on the day

arts.ttl: Burnley boss Scott Parker on Hannibal and Osmajic incident following Preston North End draw
arts.sum: Scott Parker has proclaimed Hannibal is not a “liar” after being on the wrong end of an “inappropriate” comment from Preston’s Milutin Osmajic.

arts.ttl: Cardiff City player ratings as January signings and Aaron Ramsey shine
arts.sum: Here's how the Cardiff City players rated in the 1-1 draw with Bristol City

arts.ttl: Championship roundup: Burnley held by Preston despite 11th clean sheet in a row
arts.sum: Clarets’ stunning defensive record continues at Deepdale Salech strikes late to earn Cardiff draw against Bristol City Burnley made it 11 clean sheets in a row in the Championship but were left frustrated as they drew 0-0 away at their local rivals Preston. The promotion-chasing visitors missed a series of good chances, with Lyle Foster culpable for wasting two of the clearer openings. The Clarets have had 11 scoreless draws in the league this season, while Preston continue their remarkable run of having lost just once at Deepdale in the Championship since Paul Heckingbottom’s arrival in August. This story will be updated after the 3pm kick-offs Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Burnley goalless again at Preston but secure 11th clean sheet in a row
arts.sum: Burnley made it 11 clean sheets in a row in the Sky Bet Championship but were left frustrated as they drew 0-0 away at local rivals Preston.

arts.ttl: Burnley keep another clean sheet in derby draw at Preston
Preston North End 0-0 Burnley: Clarets left to rue Lyle Foster misses after playing out 11th goalless draw
arts.sum: Burnley were left to rue a couple of glaring misses as their Lancashire derby against Preston North End ended goalless.

arts.ttl: 30 images of Burnley fans arriving at Deepdale for local derby against Preston North End
arts.sum: Following the 2-0 victory over Hull City at Turf Moor, the Clarets are now unbeaten in 21 league and cup games with no goals conceded in 10. Burnley fans will be hoping to continue the good form with a victory over Lancashire rivals Preston.
